commands.name: applicant signup
commands.description: Sign up the calling player to a playtest. Requires a player token (cli.md §6.1).

requiredFlags.name: --platforms
requiredFlags.description: comma-separated platforms owned (at least one of STEAM,XBOX,PLAYSTATION,EPIC,OTHER)

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.example: pth --profile player applicant signup --slug summer-stress-test --platforms STEAM,XBOX

commands.name: applicant status
commands.description: Show the calling player's applicant row for a playtest (cli.md §6.1).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: auth login --discord
commands.description: Discord-federated login. Browser → loopback → backend ExchangeDiscordCode (cli.md §7.1).

optionalFlags.name: --manual
optionalFlags.description: skip the loopback listener; prompt for the pasted redirect URL

optionalFlags.name: --no-browser
optionalFlags.description: do not auto-open the authorize URL

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print authorize/exchange URLs and exit

commands.name: auth login --password
commands.description: AGS IAM ROPC grant for native AGS users. Stores the token under --profile (cli.md §7.2).

optionalFlags.name: --password-stdin
optionalFlags.description: read password from one line on stdin instead of TTY prompt

commands.example: pth --namespace mygame --profile admin auth login --password --username admin@example.com --password-stdin <pw.txt

commands.name: auth logout
commands.description: Remove the stored credential for --profile (cli.md §6.1).

commands.name: auth token
commands.description: Print the active bearer token to stdout for piping into curl/grpcurl (cli.md §6.1).

commands.name: auth whoami
commands.description: Print {profile, userId, namespace, addr, expiresAt} for the active token. Non-zero exit if missing/expired (cli.md §6.1).

commands.name: describe
commands.description: Emit the JSON catalogue of every subcommand. Stable schema cli-schema.v1 (cli.md §5, §10).

commands.name: doctor
commands.description: Probe the backend with an unauth GetPublicPlaytest sentinel call. Reports gRPC code + round-trip latency (cli.md §5).

commands.name: flow golden-m1
commands.description: Composite: create-playtest → transition OPEN → signup (synthetic player) → assert PENDING. NDJSON output (cli.md §6.4, §8).

requiredFlags.name: --admin-profile
requiredFlags.description: credential profile for admin steps (create, transition)

requiredFlags.name: --player-profile
requiredFlags.description: credential profile for player steps (signup, status)

optionalFlags.name: --title
optionalFlags.description: playtest title (default: 'Playtest <slug>')

optionalFlags.name: --platforms
optionalFlags.description: platforms for both create and signup (default STEAM)

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print every step's request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.example: pth --namespace mygame flow golden-m1 --slug e2e-1234 --admin-profile admin --player-profile player

commands.name: playtest create
commands.description: Create a playtest. Admin token required. Mutable fields are PRD-whitelisted (cli.md §6.1, PRD §5.1).

optionalFlags.name: --description
optionalFlags.description: playtest description

optionalFlags.name: --banner-image-url
optionalFlags.description: banner image URL

optionalFlags.name: --platforms
optionalFlags.description: comma-separated platforms supported

optionalFlags.name: --starts-at
optionalFlags.description: RFC3339 timestamp

optionalFlags.name: --ends-at
optionalFlags.description: RFC3339 timestamp

optionalFlags.name: --nda-required
optionalFlags.description: set if the playtest requires NDA acceptance

optionalFlags.name: --nda-text
optionalFlags.description: NDA prose; prefix with @ to read from a file (e.g. @nda.md)

optionalFlags.name: --distribution-model
optionalFlags.description: STEAM_KEYS | AGS_CAMPAIGN (M1: AGS_CAMPAIGN returns Unimplemented)

optionalFlags.name: --initial-code-quantity
optionalFlags.description: initial code quantity (AGS_CAMPAIGN only)

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.example: pth --namespace mygame --profile admin playtest create --slug summer-stress-test --title 'Summer Stress Test' --platforms STEAM

commands.name: playtest delete
commands.description: Soft-delete a playtest (idempotent). Admin token required (cli.md §6.1).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: playtest edit
commands.description: Edit PRD-whitelisted mutable fields only. Slug + status + distribution-model are immutable post-creation (PRD §5.1).

optionalFlags.name: --title
optionalFlags.description: playtest title

optionalFlags.name: --description
optionalFlags.description: playtest description

optionalFlags.name: --banner-image-url
optionalFlags.description: banner image URL

optionalFlags.name: --platforms
optionalFlags.description: comma-separated platforms

optionalFlags.name: --starts-at
optionalFlags.description: RFC3339 timestamp

optionalFlags.name: --ends-at
optionalFlags.description: RFC3339 timestamp

optionalFlags.name: --nda-required
optionalFlags.description: NDA required

optionalFlags.name: --nda-text
optionalFlags.description: NDA prose; @file to load from disk

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.example: pth --namespace mygame --profile admin playtest edit --id 01J0... --title 'Updated Title'

commands.name: playtest get
commands.description: Fetch the admin view of a playtest. Admin token required (cli.md §6.1).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: playtest get-player
commands.description: Fetch the player view of a playtest. Player token required (cli.md §6.1).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: playtest get-public
commands.description: Fetch the public view of a playtest. --anon implied (cli.md §6.1).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: playtest list
commands.description: List all playtests in --namespace. Admin token required (cli.md §6.1).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: playtest transition
commands.description: Drive the playtest status machine (DRAFT → OPEN → CLOSED). Admin token required (cli.md §6.1).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.example: pth --namespace mygame --profile admin playtest transition --id 01J0... --to OPEN

commands.name: user create
commands.description: Create N AGS test users via /iam/v4/admin/.../test_users. Admin token required (cli.md §6.1).

optionalFlags.name: --count
optionalFlags.description: number of test users to create (1..100, default 1)

optionalFlags.name: --country
optionalFlags.description: ISO3166-1 alpha-2 country code (default US)

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: user delete
commands.description: Delete an AGS user (destructive). Refuses without --yes (cli.md §6.1).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: user login-as
commands.description: Password-login as a previously-created test user; stores credential under --profile (cli.md §6.1).

optionalFlags.name: --password-stdin
optionalFlags.description: read password from one line on stdin instead of TTY prompt

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: version
commands.description: Print {buildSHA, buildDate, goVersion, protoSchema, protoFileCount} (cli.md §5).
